bug.description: missing optional field that is conditionally mandatory per 3GPP specification

prompt:
There is a missing optional field that is conditionally mandatory per 3GPP specification downstream of function CU_send_UE_CONTEXT_MODIFICATION_REQUEST in the openair2/F1AP subsystem.
The function is located at openair2/F1AP/f1ap_cu_ue_context_management.c:139.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
